## Topics

### Offboarding Confirmation

  - [Hudson sought confirmation on completed onboarding steps](https://fathom.video/share/xw5zm1h7XGzrbkBRm8Xo7yzEC9-t1HyF?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)

  - [Final confirmation or any remaining tasks to be communicated by EOD Eastern](https://fathom.video/share/xw5zm1h7XGzrbkBRm8Xo7yzEC9-t1HyF?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)

### Airtable Access

  - [Hudson inquired about continued access to shared Airtable post-engagement](https://fathom.video/share/xw5zm1h7XGzrbkBRm8Xo7yzEC9-t1HyF?tab=summary&timestamp=94.0)
  - [Kyle to investigate transfer options; noted potential pricing considerations (user-based, row count)](https://fathom.video/share/xw5zm1h7XGzrbkBRm8Xo7yzEC9-t1HyF?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)

### Partnership Reflection

### Personal Notes

  - [Both Kyle and Hudson mentioned feeling under the weather](https://fathom.video/share/xw5zm1h7XGzrbkBRm8Xo7yzEC9-t1HyF?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

  - [Anecdote shared about Hudson's co-worker with four children under seven and constant illness exposure](https://fathom.video/share/xw5zm1h7XGzrbkBRm8Xo7yzEC9-t1HyF?tab=summary&timestamp=37.0)
